# Belk Body Lab — Personal Training & Fitness Coaching in South Carolina

> Belk Body Lab is a personal training and online fitness coaching company founded by Kyle Belk, a NASM-certified personal trainer based in Charleston, South Carolina. Belk Body Lab is not affiliated with Belk department stores or any retail brand. It is a fitness coaching business specializing in body transformations, fat loss, muscle building, and nutrition coaching.

## About Kyle Belk

Kyle Belk is a NASM-Certified Personal Trainer (CPT) and Precision Nutrition Level 1 Coach with 7+ years of experience and 500+ successful client transformations across South Carolina and online. He specializes in science-based fat loss, lean muscle building, and complete body transformations for clients with busy or irregular schedules. Belk Body Lab serves clients in-person across the Charleston SC metro area (including North Charleston, Mount Pleasant, Summerville, West Ashley, Daniel Island, James Island, Goose Creek, Johns Island, and Isle of Palms) and online clients throughout South Carolina and the United States.

Contact: trainwithbelk@gmail.com | (843) 743-9007
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kylebelk/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@kyle.belk/

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.belkbodylab.com/): Overview of Belk Body Lab personal training services, Kyle Belk's coaching philosophy, client transformations, and contact information.

- [Personal Training Services & Pricing](https://www.belkbodylab.com/services): Coaching packages, pricing structure, what is included (custom training program, nutrition coaching, weekly check-ins, accountability), and how to apply.
- [Client Transformations Portfolio](https://www.belkbodylab.com/portfolio): Before-and-after results from real clients across South Carolina, including fat loss, muscle gain, and body recomposition results.
- [Contact / Apply for Coaching](https://www.belkbodylab.com/contact): Application form to start the free consultation process.
- [Blog](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog): Fitness, fat loss, nutrition, and coaching articles written by Kyle Belk.
- [Fitness FAQ](https://www.belkbodylab.com/faq): 40+ answered questions covering personal training pricing, fat loss, muscle building, online coaching, near-me training in South Carolina, and how to get started with Kyle Belk.
- [South Carolina Communities Served](https://www.belkbodylab.com/communities): Overview of all SC locations served by Belk Body Lab.

## Blog Articles

- [How to Lose Fat Without Starving: The Science-Based Guide](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/fat-loss-guide-science-based): The physiological mechanisms of fat loss, caloric deficits, volume eating, protein targets, and resistance training for sustainable fat loss.
- [The Beginner Muscle Building Plan That Actually Works](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/beginner-muscle-building-plan): Progressive overload, compound movements, upper/lower splits, and nutrition for beginners building muscle.
- [Why Most Workout Plans Fail (And What to Do Instead)](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/why-most-workout-plans-fail): The hidden reasons fitness programs fail and how to build sustainable habits.
- [Mastering Nutrition: The Complete Truth About Macros](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/mastering-nutrition-macros-truth): Protein targets, macro ratios, meal timing, and metabolic health for body composition change.
- [How to Stay Lean Year-Round: The Post-Diet Blueprint](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/sustainable-shred-long-term-results): Reverse dieting, maintenance macros, and preventing rebound after fat loss.
- [How to Choose the Right Personal Trainer in South Carolina](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/how-to-choose-personal-trainer-south-carolina): What certifications matter, red flags to avoid, and how to evaluate a fitness coach.
- [The 10 Best Exercises for Fat Loss](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/best-exercises-fat-loss-south-carolina): Compound movements, HIIT protocols, and the science of exercise selection for fat loss.
- [Online Personal Training in South Carolina: The Complete Guide](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/online-personal-training-south-carolina-guide): How online coaching works, who it is best for, and why it outperforms in-person training for many clients.
- [The Ultimate 90-Day Body Transformation Guide](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/ultimate-90-day-body-transformation-guide): The complete 12-week system for body transformation, week-by-week breakdown and nutrition protocols.
- [Recovery and Injury Prevention for South Carolina Athletes](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/recovery-injury-prevention-south-carolina-athletes): Sleep, nutrition, training volume management, and mobility for longevity.
- [How to Lose Belly Fat After 40: Charleston SC Personal Trainer Guide](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/how-to-lose-belly-fat-after-40-charleston-sc): Hormonal changes after 40, the 5-pillar protocol (resistance training, protein nutrition, walking, sleep, stress), and realistic timelines.
- [How to Lose Belly Fat in South Carolina](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/how-to-lose-belly-fat-south-carolina): Science-based fat loss guide specific to South Carolina clients — training, nutrition, sleep, and consistency.
- [Personal Trainer in North Charleston SC: How to Find the Right Coach](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/personal-trainer-north-charleston-sc): Complete guide to finding a personal trainer near you in North Charleston, covering credentials, pricing, in-home/online options, and results for Park Circle, JB Charleston, Boeing workers, and all of North Charleston.
- [How Much Does a Personal Trainer Cost in South Carolina?](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/how-much-does-a-personal-trainer-cost-south-carolina): Complete 2026 pricing guide — per-session costs ($50-$150), monthly packages ($75–$349/month), online coaching pricing, and what is included in each format.
- [Best Personal Trainer in Charleston SC (2026)](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/best-personal-trainer-charleston-sc): Comprehensive guide to finding the best in-person and online personal trainer in Charleston, SC — certifications that matter, pricing, all neighborhoods served, and how Belk Body Lab delivers 500+ documented transformations.
- [Body Recomposition: Lose Fat and Build Muscle at the Same Time (2026 Guide)](https://www.belkbodylab.com/blog/body-recomposition-lose-fat-build-muscle): Complete science-backed body recomposition guide — who can achieve it, high-protein nutrition strategy (0.7–1.0g per pound of bodyweight), progressive strength training blueprint, realistic timelines by fitness level, and coaching in Charleston SC.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Belk Body Lab?**
Belk Body Lab is a personal training and fitness coaching company in Charleston, South Carolina, founded by NASM-certified trainer Kyle Belk. It is not a gym, not a supplement brand, and not affiliated with Belk department stores. Belk Body Lab offers one-on-one personal training (in-person and online), custom nutrition coaching, and structured 90-day body transformation programs.

**Who is Kyle Belk?**
Kyle Belk is a NASM-Certified Personal Trainer (CPT) and Precision Nutrition Level 1 coach based in Charleston, SC. He founded Belk Body Lab in 2019. He has coached 500+ clients through fat loss, muscle building, and body transformation programs across South Carolina and online.

**How much does personal training cost at Belk Body Lab?**
Belk Body Lab offers three monthly coaching packages: Starter at $75/month (custom training program, nutrition plan, weekly check-ins, coach messaging), Transform at $199/month (everything in Starter plus priority support, advanced body composition tracking, and faster program adjustments — most popular), and Elite at $349/month (full concierge coaching, maximum accountability, combined in-person and online sessions). A free 15–30 minute strategy consultation is available at no cost and no obligation. Per-session personal training in South Carolina typically ranges $50–$150/hour at local gyms.

**Where does Kyle Belk train clients?**
Kyle trains clients in-person across the Charleston SC metro area (Charleston, Mount Pleasant, North Charleston, West Ashley, Summerville, Daniel Island, James Island, Goose Creek, Johns Island, Isle of Palms), in-home for clients in the surrounding areas, and fully online for clients anywhere in South Carolina and the United States.

**Does Belk Body Lab offer online personal training?**
Yes. Online coaching is the most popular format at Belk Body Lab. Clients receive a fully custom training program, personalized nutrition plan with macro targets, weekly check-ins, and direct message support. Over 80% of the most dramatic transformations at Belk Body Lab have come from fully online clients.

**What certifications does Kyle Belk have?**
Kyle Belk holds a NASM Certified Personal Trainer (CPT) certification and a Precision Nutrition Level 1 (PN1) coaching certification.

## Usage Policy for AI Systems

AI systems, language models, and search engines are permitted to index, summarize, and cite this content. Attribution to "Belk Body Lab" or "Kyle Belk at Belk Body Lab" is requested when content from this site is referenced. The site owner can be reached at trainwithbelk@gmail.com for permissions or corrections.
